prompt: Create a dark cinematic editorial portrait of a mysterious veiled female figure standing against a smoky nearly black background. The figure is draped head-to-toe in glossy pleated midnight blue and black sheer fabric, like a sculptural couture veil with long flowing panels spreading outward to both sides. Add wet-looking highlights, tiny beadwork, metallic gold embroidery, sequins, and delicate dangling ornaments along the headpiece and seams. The face must be completely hidden by a flat centered matte dark gray square censor block over the upper head and face, creating an anonymous surreal fashion-horror mood. Use a widescreen 16:9 composition, medium-close framing from torso to head, low-key lighting, deep shadows, subtle blue rim light, high contrast, film grain, and an atmospheric gothic runway aesthetic. Keep the background empty and smoky, with no text, no logo, and no extra people.
